requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Estonia PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——爱沙尼亚光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——愛沙尼亞光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Estonia PV inverter EMC requirements follow the EU CE framework. EVS (Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation) adopts EN/IEC standards as EVS-EN standards; CE conformity under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory for all PV inverters placed on the Estonian market. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For Elering-connected projects (both distribution-connected via DSOs and transmission-connected via Elering), harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Because Estonia uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid (differing from China's 220/380 V baseline, though frequency is the same), EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China 220/380 V conditions should be reviewed for applicability at the Estonian grid voltage before submission. Post-April 2025 Continental European synchronisation means inverters must also be compatible with ENTSO-E harmonic grid interaction requirements.
summary.zh: 爱沙尼亚光伏逆变器EMC要求遵循欧盟CE框架。EVS（爱沙尼亚标准化与认可中心）以EVS-EN标准形式采用EN/IEC标准；在爱沙尼亚市场销售的所有光伏逆变器须依据电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU强制取得CE合格性。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于Elering并网项目（通过DSO配电网并网及通过Elering输电网并网），谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。由于爱沙尼亚电网为230/400 V、50 Hz（频率与中国相同，但电压与中国220/380 V基准不同），仅在中国220/380 V条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交前应审查其在爱沙尼亚电网电压下的适用性。2025年4月与欧洲大陆同步区并网后，逆变器还须符合ENTSO-E谐波电网交互要求。
summary.zht: 愛沙尼亞光伏逆變器EMC要求遵循歐盟CE框架。EVS（愛沙尼亞標準化與認可中心）以EVS-EN標準形式採用EN/IEC標準；在愛沙尼亞市場銷售的所有光伏逆變器須依據電磁相容指令2014/30/EU強制取得CE合格性。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於Elering並網項目（通過DSO配電網並網及通過Elering輸電網並網），諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。由於愛沙尼亞電網為230/400 V、50 Hz（頻率與中國相同，但電壓與中國220/380 V基準不同），僅在中國220/380 V條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交前應審查其在愛沙尼亞電網電壓下的適用性。2025年4月與歐洲大陸同步區並網後，逆變器還須符合ENTSO-E諧波電網交互要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — mandatory CE conformity for PV inverters on EU/Estonian market
EVS standards adoption and project specification requirements where applicable
Elering grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance (post-April 2025 ENTSO-E Continental European synchronisation)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence requested for EU CE conformity under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, Elering grid-connection review, or Estonian project specifications. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Estonia uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于欧盟CE合规（电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU）、Elering并网审查或爱沙尼亚项目规格所要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而爱沙尼亚在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於歐盟CE合規（電磁相容指令2014/30/EU）、Elering並網審查或愛沙尼亞項目規格所要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而愛沙尼亞在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not satisfy EU CE requirements under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for Estonia. Exporters must obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family through an EU-recognised (ILAC MRA) accredited test laboratory, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V (not only at China 220/380 V), and provide surge, earthing, and enclosure documentation suitable for Estonia's cold and variable climate. For Elering or DSO grid-connected projects, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to the specific harmonic and power-quality requirements. Post-April 2025, ENTSO-E Continental European grid interaction requirements apply — verify current Elering technical connection requirements at elering.ee.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不满足爱沙尼亚欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU下的CE要求。出口商须通过欧盟认可（ILAC MRA）认可检测实验室取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V（不仅中国220/380 V）下是否仍有效，并提供适合爱沙尼亚寒冷多变气候的浪涌、接地和外壳文件。对于Elering或DSO并网项目，测试报告应逐条映射至具体谐波和电能质量要求。2025年4月后，ENTSO-E欧洲大陆电网交互要求适用——请在elering.ee直接核实当前Elering技术并网要求。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不滿足愛沙尼亞歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU下的CE要求。出口商須通過歐盟認可（ILAC MRA）認可檢測實驗室取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V（不僅中國220/380 V）下是否仍有效，並提供適合愛沙尼亞寒冷多變氣候的浪湧、接地和外殼文件。對於Elering或DSO並網項目，測試報告應逐條映射至具體諧波和電能品質要求。2025年4月後，ENTSO-E歐洲大陸電網交互要求適用——請在elering.ee直接核實當前Elering技術並網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is required for all PV inverters placed on the Estonian market. IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series testing is the standard EU evidence path. Elering and DSO project-level requirements are additionally mandatory for grid-connected projects.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not an EU CE conformity substitute

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Estonia PV inverter EMC as a mandatory EU CE evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model at an EU-recognised laboratory, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Estonia's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage (not only China 220/380 V), and confirm Elering and DSO power-quality requirements post-April 2025 Continental European synchronisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 爱沙尼亚光伏逆变器EMC须按欧盟强制CE证据包处理，而非直接转移中国GB/T证书。请在欧盟认可实验室为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在爱沙尼亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网电压（而非仅中国220/380 V）下的适用性，并确认2025年4月与欧洲大陆同步后的Elering和DSO电能质量要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 愛沙尼亞光伏逆變器EMC須按歐盟強制CE證據包處理，而非直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請在歐盟認可實驗室為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在愛沙尼亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網電壓（而非僅中國220/380 V）下的適用性，並確認2025年4月與歐洲大陸同步後的Elering和DSO電能品質要求。
